intro: DEVICES, dressings, and garments used in dermatological care.
reading: Dermatology-related devices are mostly wound-care and compression products: dressings, patches, compression garments and socks, plus general supplies like mild soap used in wound cleaning.

terms.example_en: Apply the medical patch directly over the area.
terms.example_ru: Наклейте медицинский пластырь непосредственно на область.
terms.note: An adhesive covering applied to the skin to protect a wound or sore, or to deliver medication transdermally (e.g. nicotine, lidocaine or pain-relief patches).

terms.example_en: Wear the compression stockings during the day.
terms.example_ru: Носите компрессионные чулки в течение дня.
terms.note: An elastic garment worn around the leg that applies graduated pressure — highest at the ankle and decreasing upward — to improve venous blood return and reduce swelling.

terms.example_en: The compression garment helps reduce swelling.
terms.note: Tight-fitting elastic clothing that applies sustained pressure to a body area to control swelling, support post-surgical healing, and manage conditions like lymphedema or venous insufficiency.

terms.example_en: Change the dressing once a day.
terms.example_ru: Меняйте повязку один раз в день.
terms.note: A material applied to a wound to provide a protective barrier against contamination, absorb drainage, and maintain the moisture level needed for healing.

terms.example_en: The shrinker sock reduces swelling after amputation.
terms.example_ru: Компрессионный носок уменьшает отёк после ампутации.
terms.note: A compression garment worn over the residual limb after amputation to reduce post-surgical swelling and gradually reshape the limb into a conical form suitable for prosthetic fitting.

terms.example_en: Clean the wound with mild soap and water.
terms.example_ru: Промойте рану мягким мылом и водой.
